## Summary

Describe the concrete behavior changed by this pull request.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv run python -m build`
- [ ] Real-device validation performed when the change affects ADB/device behavior

## Runtime and safety impact

Explain changes to action side effects, verification evidence, recovery behavior, sensitive
action handling, or trajectory compatibility. Write `None` when not applicable.

## Compatibility

List user-visible CLI, configuration, Python API, or trajectory schema changes.
